basics.name: Rameez Muhammadh
basics.label: Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: Results-driven full-stack developer with a year of hands-on experience in Laravel, React, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, and WordPress. Specialize in translating client requirements into scalable solutions while adhering to coding standards and best practices. Excel in full-stack development, ensuring impactful outcomes through meticulous attention to detail. Continuously evolve skills to deliver innovative solutions. Strong communicator with a collaborative mindset, thrive in team environments to drive successful project delivery.

education.area: Sri Lanka Institute of Advanced Technological Education (SLIATE)

references.name: Rameez Muhammadh
references.reference: Rameez is a talented developer who has a strong understanding of the full stack. He is a quick learner and has a great attitude. He is a great team player and is always willing to help others. I would highly recommend Rameez for any development role.

projects.name: Team Comrade
projects.description: A state-of-the-art tuition management system designed to streamline operations for both administrators and institutes, ensuring efficient student enrollment, attendance tracking, and financial accuracy.
highlights: Contributed to over 45% of the overall development, including designing the home page, implementing student enrolment for 2,500+ students across 6 branches, and automating attendance tracking with RFID cards, reducing  manual tracking efforts by 70%.

Developed a robust Front Office page with comprehensive functionality for system management, including creating invoices, managing users and expenses, marking tutorial sessions, inviting users, transferring funds,marking attendance, and checking student enrolments.

Engineered a flexible system supporting both overall admin management and institute-specific management, providing tailored operations similar to a multi-tenant product model. Developed a robust payout functionality for tutors, processing 250+ payouts monthly, and implemented an automated invoice system with payment capabilities, improving financial accuracy by 60%.

Integrated a notification system using the Notify.lk API to send 10,000+ SMS notifications monthly, including attendance updates and invoices to parents. Built a secure OTP-based authentication system with phone number verification, enhancing user security and accessibility

projects.name: CQHE
projects.description: An advanced IT management system for a UK-based qualification awarding body, enabling seamless onboarding, certification, and real-time notifications with a focus on automation and efficiency.
highlights: Led the development of a comprehensive IT management system for a UK-based vocational qualification awarding body, including a multi-step onboarding process with middleware for step control, verification, and real-time notifications, reducing manual effort by 65%

Designed customizable certificate templates and implemented automated PDF generation for certificates and World Education Services (WES) applications, reducing manual effort by 60% and enhancing user satisfaction.
Developed a dynamic email gateway configuration, an application settings module for system controls, and middleware for maintenance and coming soon modes, streamlining access and authentication,
Optimized system performance through MySQL query optimization, achieving a 25% reduction in query execution time, and enhanced reliability across core functionalities.

projects.name: Billbook Website
projects.description: A feature-rich WordPress website tailored for a POS SaaS product, focusing on intuitive design, high performance, and seamless user interaction.
highlights: Designed and developed a WordPress website for a POS SaaS product, prioritizing UI/UX, performance, and SEO optimization.
Achieved a 30% reduction in page load times, enhancing site speed and user experience.
Improved user engagement by 10% through intuitive and modern UI design tailored to the target audience.

Increased organic traffic by 15% with effective on-site SEO techniques, including optimized content and meta tags.   - Utilized tools like Elementor and Yoast SEO to customize the theme, ensuring functionality and visibility.

projects.name: IT Starter (Pvt) Ltd
projects.description: An SEO-optimized, visually appealing WordPress website showcasing cutting-edge design and functionality, tailored to enhance engagement and boost business growth.
highlights: Developed theme-based WordPress websites, focusing on UI/UX enhancements, performance optimization, and SEO.
Achieved 20% faster load times, 30% improved user engagement, and 35% growth in organic traffic.
Leveraged tools like Elementor and Yoast SEO to customize themes and SEO optimize functionality.

projects.name: Transfood Lanka (Pvt) Ltd
projects.description: A modernized WordPress website for a Sri Lankan authentic spice export company, crafted to reflect the brand's heritage while optimizing performance and SEO to boost visibility globally.
highlights: Redesigned the WordPress website for a Sri Lankan authentic spice export company, focusing on performance, aesthetic appeal, and SEO.
Reduced page load time by 35%, enhancing user experience and accessibility.
Boosted organic traffic by 30% through improved on-site SEO, including optimized content, meta tags, and media.
Delivered a visually appealing design that reflects the brand’s authenticity and enhances user engagement.
